name: test-zombie-racing
author: Limon
description:
Zombie Racing lets players bet on a configurable virtual race, locks betting when a race starts, broadcasts live race commentary while the race is running, then finishes the race through delayed hooks after the configured duration.

Features
- Configure racer names, odds, labels, race name, min/max bet limits, and commentary templates.
- Scheduled races start from the `startRace` cronjob and finish through `finishRaceAfterScheduledStart`.
- Admins can start a race with `/startrace`; `finishRaceAfterManualStart` completes it after the same delayed lifecycle.
- Bets, entrant odds, planned finishing order, and commentary are frozen when a race starts.
- Commentary hooks broadcast early, middle, and late race moments such as leads, chases, and overtakes.
- `recoverRunningRace` runs every minute to finish races that remain running past their expected finish time.

Configuration
Set the user config to define the race economy and entrant list. Entrants use `Name; Odds` lines, for example `Solo; 2`. Commentary templates can use `{winner}`, `{leader}`, `{rival}`, `{raceName}`, `{racer}`, and `{racers}` placeholders.

![Zombie Racing user config](./screenshots/zombieracing_config.png)

System config controls the enabled state, scheduled cronjobs, delayed commentary hooks, delayed finish hooks, and command availability. The finish hooks default to a 60 second delay unless overridden during install or update.

![Zombie Racing system config](./screenshots/zombieracing_system_config.png)

Commands
- `/racers` lists configured racers, odds, and next race timing.
- `/racebet <racer> <amount>` places or replaces a bet while betting is open.
- `/myracebets` shows the player's open or locked-in race bets.
- `/nextrace` shows the next scheduled start while betting is open, or the finish countdown while a race is running.
- `/lastrace` shows the most recent completed race result.
- `/racestats` shows the player's racing stats.
- `/raceleaderboard` shows top racing bettors.
- `/startrace` starts a race immediately for admins and announces that results will follow after the hook delay.

![Zombie Racing command flow](./screenshots/zombieracing_chat.png)

Hooks and cronjobs
- `announceRace` broadcasts the upcoming scheduled race from the `startRace` cron expression.
- `startRace` closes betting and starts the scheduled race.
- `raceCommentaryEarlyAfterScheduledStart`, `raceCommentaryMiddleAfterScheduledStart`, and `raceCommentaryLateAfterScheduledStart` broadcast scheduled-race commentary.
- `raceCommentaryEarlyAfterManualStart`, `raceCommentaryMiddleAfterManualStart`, and `raceCommentaryLateAfterManualStart` broadcast manual-race commentary.
- `finishRaceAfterScheduledStart` listens for `cronjob-executed` events from `startRace`.
- `finishRaceAfterManualStart` listens for `command-executed` events from `startrace`.
- `recoverRunningRace` finishes stale running races without double-paying already finished races.

The event feed shows successful delayed hook and recovery cronjob executions for the tested race lifecycle.

![Zombie Racing events](./screenshots/zombieracing_events.png)

Requirements
Players need the `RACING_BET` permission to place bets. Admins need `RACING_ADMIN` for `/startrace`. The game server economy must be enabled so bets and payouts can move currency.

minBet.title: minBet
minBet.description: Minimum amount required to place a bet

maxBet.title: maxBet
maxBet.description: Maximum amount allowed for a bet

racerTypeLabel.title: Racer type label
racerTypeLabel.description: Singular label for racers in command output.

racerTypePluralLabel.title: Racer type plural label
racerTypePluralLabel.description: Plural label for racers in command output.

entrants.title: Entrants
entrants.description: List of racers. Format: Name; Odds (whole number) - one racer per line.

commentaryEarlyTemplates.title: Early race commentary templates
commentaryEarlyTemplates.description: Messages used for the first live race update. Supports {winner}, {leader}, {rival}, {raceName}, {racer}, and {racers}.
default: {leader} jumps out first, but {winner} is staying close.
{leader} takes the early lead while {winner} waits for an opening.
{leader} is setting the pace. {winner} is right behind.

commentaryMiddleTemplates.title: Middle race commentary templates
commentaryMiddleTemplates.description: Messages used for the second live race update. Supports {winner}, {leader}, {rival}, {raceName}, {racer}, and {racers}.
default: {winner} is catching {leader} fast. {rival} is trying to keep pace.
{winner} closes the gap on {leader}; {rival} is still in the mix.
{leader} is under pressure now. {winner} is gaining ground.

commentaryLateTemplates.title: Late race commentary templates
commentaryLateTemplates.description: Messages used for the final live race update before results. Supports {winner}, {leader}, {rival}, {raceName}, {racer}, and {racers}.
default: {winner} surges past {leader}; the finish line is close.
{winner} finds another gear and takes the lead from {leader}.

permissions.description: Allows the player to bet on races
Allows the player to manage races

raceleaderboard.description: Show the top racing bettors and their statistics

racers.description: List configured racers and race information

racebet.description: Place a bet on a racer for the next race

arguments.name: racer
arguments.helpText: Name of the racer you want to bet on

announceRace.description: Announce each upcoming two-hour race 15 minutes before it starts

startRace.description: Start the scheduled race every two hours

recoverRunningRace.description: Recover races that remain running after their expected finish time

raceCommentaryEarlyAfterScheduledStart.description: Broadcast the first scheduled race commentary update

raceCommentaryMiddleAfterScheduledStart.description: Broadcast the second scheduled race commentary update

raceCommentaryLateAfterScheduledStart.description: Broadcast the final scheduled race commentary update before results

raceCommentaryEarlyAfterManualStart.description: Broadcast the first manual race commentary update

raceCommentaryMiddleAfterManualStart.description: Broadcast the second manual race commentary update

raceCommentaryLateAfterManualStart.description: Broadcast the final manual race commentary update before results

finishRaceAfterScheduledStart.description: Finish a scheduled race after the configured delay

finishRaceAfterManualStart.description: Finish a manually started race after the configured delay
